status: done (merged into main as PR #130 / commit 0bdf299)
purpose: DREQ carve out 2/4 part 1 — Admin-UI backend. intake token 발급/조회/revoke admin endpoint (API-66..68) + ADR-0014 + migration 000026 RBAC seed. frontend 페이지는 별도 sprint p 로 분할.

adr_0014.summary: 신규 RBAC resource `dev_request_intake_tokens` (system_admin 일임). plain 1회 노출 + hashed 절대 미노출 + idempotent revoke. accounts_admin temp_password 패턴과 정합.

endpoints: API-66 POST /api/v1/dev-request-tokens — 발급. server 가 32-byte base64url plain token 생성, SHA-256(hex) 만 저장.
API-68 DELETE /api/v1/dev-request-tokens/:token_id — revoke. revoked_at = COALESCE(revoked_at, NOW()) (idempotent).

files.domain: internal/domain/rbac.go — ResourceDevRequestIntakeTokens + AllResources + DefaultPermissionMatrix 4 role 갱신
files.httpapi_iface: internal/httpapi/dev_request_intake_auth.go — IntakeTokenStore interface 에 admin 3 메서드 추가
files.docs: docs/adr/0014-dreq-intake-token-admin.md + backend_api_contract §14.10 + traceability §3 DREQ row + §4 ADR + development_roadmap M5 DREQ entry

new_unit_tests_8: TestCreateDevRequestIntakeToken_Happy — plain_token 1회 노출 + hashed_token 미노출 + audit 발급 (plain 미포함)
TestIntakeTokenAdmin_RoutePoliciesSystemAdminOnly — routePermissionTable + DefaultPermissionMatrix 둘 다 검증 (4 role 가드)

next_carve.2_4_part_2: DREQ-Admin-UI frontend (sprint p) — /admin/settings/dev-request-tokens 페이지. accounts_admin password issuance modal 패턴 따름.
next_carve.3_4: DREQ-E2E (sprint q) — Playwright spec (intake → dashboard widget → promote → admin token issue/revoke) + TC-DREQ-* 발급. promote-tx P2 carve out (race 가드 / failPromote dead field) 도 흡수 후보.
